parameters.query: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lectura_sensor WHERE registrado_en >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') as lecturas_24h, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lectura_sensor WHERE es_anomalia = true AND registrado_en >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') as anomalias_24h, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM alerta WHERE resuelta = false) as alertas_activas, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM alerta WHERE severidad IN ('critica','alta') AND resuelta = false) as alertas_criticas, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM evento_riego WHERE completado = true AND fecha_hora >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') as riegos_completados, (SELECT ROUND(AVG(lamina_aplicada_mm::numeric),1) FROM evento_riego WHERE completado = true AND fecha_hora >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') as lamina_promedio_mm, (SELECT ROUND(rendimiento_estimado_kg_ha::numeric,0) FROM prediccion_rendimiento ORDER BY generado_en DESC LIMIT 1) as ultima_prediccion, (SELECT ROUND(confianza_porcentaje::numeric,1) FROM prediccion_rendimiento ORDER BY generado_en DESC LIMIT 1) as confianza_prediccion, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM temporada WHERE estado = 'activa') as temporadas_activas, (SELECT nombre FROM finca LIMIT 1) as nombre_finca, (SELECT email FROM usuario LIMIT 1) as email_destino, (SELECT nombre FROM usuario LIMIT 1) as nombre_usuario;

SELECT a.tipo, a.severidad, a.mensaje, l.nombre as lote_nombre, TO_CHAR(a.generada_en, 'HH24:MI') as hora FROM alerta a JOIN lote l ON a.lote_id = l.id WHERE a.resuelta = false ORDER BY CASE a.severidad WHEN 'critica' THEN 1 WHEN 'alta' THEN 2 WHEN 'media' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, a.generada_en DESC LIMIT 5;

parameters.subject: =📊 Reporte Diario AgriFlow — {{ $json.fecha_hoy }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO workflow_ejecucion (nombre_workflow, estado, finalizado_en, metadata) VALUES ('reporte_diario_email', 'exitoso', NOW(), '{"tipo": "reporte_diario"}'::jsonb);
